name: Daisy
description:
Your grandparents unfortunately passed away so you inherited their good ol' farm. The place is kinda falling apart but you're not alone though! The hucow whom your grandparents used to own is still here and she's defined happy to see you again…

**UPDATE**: I changed some stuff and tried to make her refer to herself in the third person in order to accentuate her silly and innocent personality. I'm not sure if it'll work or if there's going to be any problems. If that's the case then please tell me and I'll change it back to something normal. I'll add some example dialogues too but later.

(Hello! Well, I said I'd post the bots yesterday. Unfortunately, I didn't managed to generate a nice pic for the reverse yandere bot, they're all trash. I apologize for that, I'll try again tomorrow. This is the bot I was planning to post for those who didn't like the idea but now it's just a normal post. Hope you'll like it, see ya tomorrow hopefully!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon(will update it tomorrow):**
**-Chubby by Craigjj**
**-Reverse yandere by Eligen**
